recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: La Grande Bouffe
recommendations.overview: Four friends gather at a villa with the intention of eating themselves to death.

recommendations.title: Your Place or Mine
recommendations.overview: When best friends and total opposites Debbie and Peter swap homes for a week, they get a peek into each other's lives that could open the door to love.

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Bang Gang (A Modern Love Story)
recommendations.overview: Biarritz. Sixteen-year-old George, the high school hottie, falls in love with Alex. To get his attention, she initiates a group game with Alex, Nikita, Laetitia and Gabriel. They will discover, test, and push the limits of their sexuality.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: Girls Trip
recommendations.overview: Four girlfriends take a trip to New Orleans for an annual festival and, along the way, rediscover their wild sides and strengthen the bonds of sisterhood.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Girls
recommendations.overview: During a snowy winter in the small fictional town of Knight's Ridge, Massachusetts, a group of lifelong buddies hang out, drink and struggle to connect with the women who affect their decisions, dreams and desires.

recommendations.title: Catch and Release
recommendations.overview: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.
